productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Stormlock converts Shelter Rise protection into a faster mint launch while Signal Cut cargo unlocks a harder amber high line; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge post-rest safe-versus-pressure route choice
lastRefinementUnit.result: Counterwind Rest now opens one readable mint recovery line and one amber signal shortcut at +46 pressure; both paths use the existing route/cargo/pressure owners and converge at Fork Relay.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge immediate post-Stormlock branch payoff
lastCompletedUnit.result: Stormlock now selects one immediate payoff: Slipstream Launch applies a 1.34x safe launch window, while Cacheline High spends 1.75 existing cargo for a smaller target inside a stronger amber gust.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 Next Ledge test entrypoints, changed JavaScript syntax, and diff checks passed. Playwright traversed both payoff branches through public session input, proved the launch multiplier and cargo spend, reached a real dead state and keyboard retry, checked closed/open/closed Advanced disclosure, stable settled DOM/entity/descriptor counts, and a hidden error panel. Human View moved the mint target for clarity and caught then verified the WebGL/HUD layer repair. Final matched FPS was 28.69 versus 29.13 before, a 1.5 percent change within budget, with one long task in both samples and no steady-state entity growth.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments production commit 778cd0365db28a7475e9e9a923af4dc29162c9db is published on origin/main after fetch-before-push verification; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Add one Windglass Relay convergence beat that scores preserved speed from Slipstream Launch versus elevated cargo mastery from Cacheline High before generic ascent resumes, without a new control or state owner.
